_comment: F28 strategy hyperparameters. Single source of truth. Values here override module defaults; main.py loads this file at boot. The C++ port will parse the same file.

frank._comment: Phase 1 death-signal thresholds. Per spec, these should be tuned on historical rolls; the defaults below are heuristics only.

ekf._comment: OU calibration for CL convenience yield. Replace with MLE fits on a historical basis series before live deployment.

execution._kappa_map_comment: HMM regime -> Almgren-Chriss urgency. Keys are logical state ids: 0=Quiet, 1=Trending, 2=Distressed. Spec marks these as initial heuristics; calibrate by minimizing realized slippage.

totem._comment: price_floor is commodity-specific. $5 for CL catches the Apr-2020 negative-price regime. For ES/NQ set to null (cannot go negative).
